name: make_voice_call
description: Initiate an outbound voice call using the Vonage Voice API. You can connect the call to a phone number, SIP endpoint, or WebSocket. Provide an answer_url that returns NCCO (Nexmo Call Control Object) instructions to control call flow, or use inline NCCO for simple calls. Returns a conversation UUID and call UUID for managing the call.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Array of destination objects. Each object has 'type' (phone/sip/websocket) and 'number' (E.164 format for phone type). Currently only single-destination calls are supported.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: The caller ID object with 'type' ('phone') and 'number' (your Vonage virtual number in E.164 format).

parameters.name: answer_url
parameters.description: Array containing the URL that returns NCCO JSON instructions when the call is answered. Either answer_url or ncco must be provided.

parameters.name: ncco
parameters.description: Inline NCCO (Nexmo Call Control Object) array of action objects. Use this instead of answer_url for simple call flows. Actions include 'talk', 'stream', 'input', 'connect', 'record'.

parameters.name: event_url
parameters.description: Array containing the webhook URL for call event updates (ringing, answered, completed, etc.).

parameters.name: length_timer
parameters.description: Maximum call duration in seconds. Default is 7200 (2 hours).

parameters.name: ringing_timer
parameters.description: Time in seconds to wait for the call to be answered before timing out. Default is 60.

ncco.text: Hello, this is a reminder that your appointment is tomorrow at 10 AM. Press 1 to confirm or 2 to reschedule.
